sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (user_id Int32, user_name String, user_agent String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY user_id;
ALTER TABLE test_table ADD PROJECTION user_agent_projection (SELECT user_agent, count() AS count GROUP BY user_agent);
INSERT INTO test_table (user_id, user_name, user_agent) VALUES (1, 'Alice', 'Chrome'), (2, 'Bob', 'Firefox'), (3, 'Charlie', 'Chrome');
SELECT user_agent, count FROM test_table PREWHERE user_id > 0 GROUP BY user_agent;
ALTER TABLE test_table MATERIALIZE PROJECTION user_agent_projection;
